name: Remote SSH
description: SSH into remote devices and execute shell commands transparently on remote machines.
author: AlpacaKnight

commands.name: /remote
commands.description: Manage the current remote SSH session and execute commands on the remote machine.

tools.name: remote_connect
tools.description: Connect to a remote device via SSH. After connecting, all shell commands in this conversation will execute on the remote machine.

tools.name: remote_disconnect
tools.description: Disconnect from the current remote SSH session.

tools.name: remote_list
tools.description: Show the current remote SSH connection status.

tools.name: remote_exec
tools.description: Explicitly execute a command on the remote machine via SSH.
